# Koli One

> Bulgaria's leading AI-powered car marketplace

Koli One ([koli.one](https://koli.one)) is a comprehensive car marketplace platform serving Bulgaria. It enables private sellers, professional dealers, and enterprise fleets to list, price, and sell vehicles with AI-powered tools.

## What Koli One Does

- **Car Marketplace**: Buy and sell cars across Bulgaria with listings covering 26+ brands and 29 cities
- **AI Valuation**: Machine learning-based price estimation using Bulgarian market data, mileage, specs, and historical sales
- **AI Description Generator**: Automatic SEO-optimized listing descriptions in Bulgarian and English
- **AI Car Advisor**: Interactive AI chat assistant for car recommendations and market insights
- **AI Vision**: Image analysis for vehicle condition assessment, damage detection, and plate recognition
- **Smart Search**: Hybrid Algolia + Firestore search with natural language query parsing
- **Dealer Tools**: Bulk CSV upload, analytics dashboards, campaign management, API access
- **Messaging**: Built-in buyer-seller chat with real-time presence
- **Mobile App**: Native iOS/Android app via Expo/React Native

## Subscription Plans

| Plan | Price | Listings | Key Features |
|------|-------|----------|--------------|
| Free | €0/mo | 3/month | Basic listing, AI chat (3 uses) |
| Dealer | €50/mo | 100/month | Bulk upload, featured listings, analytics, priority support |
| Company | €500/mo | Unlimited | API access, webhooks, custom branding, dedicated manager |

## AI Plans

| Plan | Price | AI Advisor | AI Valuation | Car History |
|------|-------|------------|--------------|-------------|
| Free | €0 | 3 uses | 1 use | — |
| Basic | €9.99/mo | 20 uses | 10 uses | 5 uses |
| Professional | €29.99/mo | 100 uses | 50 uses | 20 uses |
| Enterprise | €99.99/mo | Unlimited | Unlimited | Unlimited |

## Technology

- Frontend: React 18 + TypeScript + Vite (web), Expo SDK 54 + React Native (mobile)
- Backend: Firebase (Firestore, Cloud Functions Node 20, Auth, Storage, Realtime Database)
- AI: Gemini (primary), DeepSeek (cost-optimized), GPT-4 (premium)
- Search: Algolia + Firestore hybrid
- Analytics: Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel

## Company

- **Name**: Alaa Technologies
- **Location**: Sofia, Bulgaria
- **Founded**: 2024
- **Contact**: support@koli.one
- **Languages**: Bulgarian, English
